title: Represent a structured log event
scenario: Structured logging starts with events that have names and levels instead of ad-hoc strings.
instructions: Define LogLevel and LogEvent with event_name and level fields.

hints.body: Define LogLevel with Info, Warn, and Error variants, then define LogEvent with event_name and level fields.
Derive Debug, Clone, PartialEq, and Eq; LogLevel can also derive Copy because it has only unit variants.
One complete solution for Represent a structured log event is shown below.

completionExplanation: LogEvent now models an event name and severity as typed data instead of an ad-hoc log string.
